class.name: ModLoader
class.brief_description: Singleton for loading and managing mods at runtime.
class.description:
The [ModLoader] singleton scans a mods directory for [code].pck[/code] files and mod folders, loads them at runtime without requiring a restart, and manages their lifecycle. Mods can contain scenes, scripts, textures, audio, and any other Godot resource. Folder-based mods require a [code]mod.cfg[/code] metadata file. PCK mods are loaded directly. [b]mod.cfg format:[/b] [codeblock] [mod] name = "My Mod" version = "1.0.0" author = "Creator" description = "Adds cool stuff" entry_scene = "res://mods/my_mod/main.tscn"
[dependencies] required = "base_mod" optional = "optional_mod" [/codeblock] [b]Usage:[/b] [codeblock] # Scan and load all mods on startup: ModLoader.scan_mods() ModLoader.load_all_mods()
# Or load specific mods: ModLoader.load_mod("my_mod")
# Check what's loaded: for mod_id in ModLoader.get_mod_list(): var info = ModLoader.get_mod_info(mod_id) print("%s v%s by %s" % [info.name, info.version, info.author]) [/codeblock] By default, mods are loaded from [code]user://mods/[/code]. Mods with an [code]entry_scene[/code] or [code]entry_script[/code] are registered as autoloads automatically. Mods are loaded in dependency order — mods without dependencies load first, then mods whose dependencies are satisfied.

method.name: scan_mods
method.description: Scans the mods directory for [code].pck[/code] files and folders with [code]mod.cfg[/code]. Call this before [method load_all_mods]. Creates the mods directory if it doesn't exist.

method.name: load_mod
method.description: Loads a specific mod by its ID (folder name or PCK filename without extension). Automatically loads required dependencies first. Emits [signal mod_loaded] on success.

method.name: unload_mod
method.description: Unloads a mod by removing its autoload entry. Note: PCK file data remains in memory until the application exits. Emits [signal mod_unloaded].

method.name: load_all_mods
method.description: Loads all discovered mods in dependency order. Calls [method scan_mods] first if no mods have been scanned yet.

method.name: get_mod_list
method.description: Returns an array of all discovered mod IDs.

method.name: get_mod_info
method.description: Returns a dictionary with mod metadata: [code]id[/code], [code]name[/code], [code]version[/code], [code]author[/code], [code]description[/code], [code]path[/code], [code]is_pck[/code], [code]status[/code], [code]error[/code], [code]dependencies[/code].

method.name: is_mod_loaded
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the mod with the given ID is currently loaded.

method.name: get_mod_count
method.description: Returns the total number of discovered mods.

members.member: The directory to scan for mods. Defaults to [code]user://mods/[/code].
If [code]true[/code], mods can override existing game files. If [code]false[/code], mod resources are added alongside but don't replace existing ones. Enable this for total conversion mods.

signal.name: mod_loaded
signal.description: Emitted when a mod is successfully loaded and activated.

signal.name: mod_unloaded
signal.description: Emitted when a mod is unloaded.

constants.constant: The mod has been discovered but not yet loaded.
The mod's PCK or folder has been mounted into the resource system.
The mod is fully active with its entry point registered as an autoload.
The mod failed to load due to missing dependencies, corrupt files, or other errors.
